title: Google Ads Machine Learning Systems
subtitle: How Smart Bidding, automation layers, and the modern auction actually work — and how to operate them.
summary: Google Ads has shifted from a manual bidding platform to an AI-driven auction system where Smart Bidding, broad match, and Performance Max do most of the work. This course explains what each ML system optimizes for, why traditional tactics (exact match keywords, manual CPC, granular ad groups) often hurt now, and how to operate the new account structure: signal-rich conversion tracking, audience layering, creative variety, and disciplined measurement. Built for marketers who want to stop fighting the machine.
